note: Session 001 — plaintext. Encryption module not yet built. All future sessions will be AES-256-GCM encrypted.
context: Project inception session. Full architecture discussion. All major decisions made.

decisions_locked.stack: vanilla JS, no npm, no bundler, pure browser
decisions_locked.deployment: GitHub Pages, public repo, user-key encrypted
decisions_locked.caching: SW pre-caches all modules on first install — Tokyo expensive internet, pay once

messages.content: https://github.com/PandaDesign-in/bot/tree/main new chapter new project read the repo end to end to understand and to create what is required, discuss first only ! think deep

Read repo. Found 3 files: LICENSE, README.md, goals. No code exists. Spec describes AI Architecture Workbench (AAW) v2.0 — GitHub-native PWA for architects. Full analysis presented covering: purpose, tech stack, planned architecture, security model, 8-phase roadmap, gaps. Asked 8 clarifying questions before building.

write CAD reader and visualiser, grab a list of all file formats that ever exists and make 1 simple box which can visualize (pan, rotate, zoom) the file/(s) and created a full structural and design analysis report, PWA - super focus, keep everything stored (inside the encrypted stack as its contents, lose nothing unless deleted, files dragged and dropped to render or upload, it MUST render all cad and stl and 3d model files - no exception and it should stay lite on the user's ram so let bulk js sit at github and be called from browser when in need, go smart caching, create and log independent session summaries, for chat make 8b default for file analysis use 70b, for talking use whisper, tie everything together in terms of accessing context from dump when asked, api will be provided in tool, only single user master tool, eventually the rendered model's 70b model's architecture and civil perspective suggestion should be generated, all these ai traits let it be banked in a road map ask for more

Updated understanding confirmed. Presented: complete file format matrix (Groups A-E covering ~60+ formats), revised architecture diagram, 6-phase roadmap. Asked 8 questions: shell size, viewer layout, report output, IFC priority, voice in/out, RAM limits, regulatory codes, Phase 6 roadmap bank.
vanilla - next js? always discuss everything before you proceed to code. this is an inhouse tool for internal works

Full vanilla vs Next.js comparison presented. Recommended vanilla — GitHub Pages, no build step, lazy-loading from GitHub raw URLs is natural, WASM loads cleanly, matches TC Plants philosophy. In-house single-user = no need for React scale. Asked 3 follow-up questions: deployment target, exact file structure, design language.
no npm, just any js that does the best fit work from the browser so vanilla is fine
Vanilla confirmed. Still needed 5 answers: single vs multi-file, deployment, where to start, color theme. Also asked about left sidebar file tree (user added this requirement).

great left is file tree then 3d viewer for any file (can more functions than pan, rotate and zoom be added? - can make it fun to increase functionalities - just saying), then the right is the communication, bottom will be the box where the ai's geometric, structural, architectural detailed observation/recommendations will be, my sister is also doing interiors other than building and designing houses so the ai which is 70b's recommendation should change accordingly - we can scale and mod it later with char map of it - let it be a separate map to answer the questions 1.single but what do you suggest? 2. deployment - github only - public but most things to be encrypted with that 1 key of the user, 3. all first, I would do crypto + sync foundation and build 3d viewer as dom inside it but what's your suggestion, 4. both (should be able to toggle)

Full layout confirmed. Extended 3D controls listed (section cut, explode, wireframe/xray, measurement, face picker, orthographic views, turntable, shadow/HDRI, layer visibility, first-person walk, screenshot, grid+compass, 4-viewport). Charmap proposed for architecture vs interior personas. Recommended shell+lazy-modules over single file (20MB+ would be too heavy). Crypto+sync first agreed. Dark/light toggle confirmed. Asked app name and whether to start.
did you freeze for my previous message for 10 mins with no output
Acknowledged — no timestamp visibility on my end, likely just heavy generation. Asked final question: app name, then said ready to start.

lets remove the ram utility, she does have a fat config computer 64 gigs of ram! so no worries there so lets remove that - if that issue is out of the picture then what do you suggest, she lives at tokyo, internet is fast but very expensive - which is why I suggested single dump load with everything down, lets call that PandaAI, fix it put its emoji as logo write it as the charmap and for it, question 2 ok, Q3 will go with your order - please remember there should be all cad and 3d model file extension view compatibility - very imp, Q4 just leave the repo name as is, yes start, in the repo make sure to add a note that claude must log every chat conversation as is without changes as dumps so that next time claudecode can visit and pick it up from there, no excuses, it must always work without mistakes do deep scans before it begins and no slip shot works!

All decisions locked. RAM optimization removed (64GB). Caching strategy: SW pre-caches ALL modules on first install — Tokyo pays once, then offline forever. App named PandaAI with 🐼 emoji. Charmap to be written. Repo stays as 'bot'. CLAUDE.md created with full agent protocol. Session logging system created. Building in order: CLAUDE.md → charmap.json → manifest.json → index.html → sw.js → modules.
